Class SymbolicExecutionTermLabelUpdate

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label.SymbolicExecutionTermLabelUpdate
All Implemented Interfaces:
RuleSpecificTask, TermLabelUpdate
public class SymbolicExecutionTermLabelUpdate extends Object implements TermLabelUpdate
Makes sure that the ID of SymbolicExecutionTermLabels is increased when a WhileInvariantRule is applied.

    Description
    ImmutableList<Name>
    getSupportedRuleNames()
    Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.
    void
    updateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, JTerm modalityTerm, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Set<TermLabel> labels)
    This method can freely add, remove or sort the given TermLabel which will be added to the new JTerm.

  • Method Details

    • getSupportedRuleNames

      public ImmutableList<Name> getSupportedRuleNames()
      Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.
      Specified by:
      getSupportedRuleNames in interface RuleSpecificTask
      Returns:
      The list of supported rule Names or null/empty list if all rules are supported.

    • updateLabels

      public void updateLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, JTerm modalityTerm, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm, Set<TermLabel> labels)
      This method can freely add, remove or sort the given TermLabel which will be added to the new JTerm.
      Specified by:
      updateLabels in interface TermLabelUpdate
      Parameters:
      state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application. return true keep TermLabel and add it to the new JTerm. false drop TermLabel and do not need it to the new JTerm.
      services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
      applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the JTerm that is rewritten.
      applicationTerm - The JTerm defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
      modalityTerm - The optional modality JTerm.
      rule - The Rule which is applied.
      ruleApp - The RuleApp which is currently performed.
      hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
      tacletTerm - The optional JTerm in the taclet which is responsible to instantiate the new JTerm for the new proof node or null in case of built in rules.
      newTerm - the template for the new JTerm to create
      labels - The Set of TermLabels to modify.
